steps.panelName: Humphrey Dumphrey sat on a wall

steps.stepDescription: Talk to Alan in Tal Teok Temple, north of Tal Teklan, to start the quest.

steps.panelName: Wumty Scrumpty had a great fall

steps.stepDescription: Inspect the egg in front of you.
Head south into Tal Teklan and talk to King in the pub.

steps.panelName: All the king's horses and all the king's men...

steps.stepDescription: Get an empty bowl from the pub, will need it later. If it's not there, hop worlds or wait for it to spawn again.
Talk to Acatzin inside the Tal Teklan pub.
Talk to the Blacksmith west of the Tal Teklan pub.
Fix the whetstone.
Repair the axe on the whetstone.
Get the Saw from the house to the south, we'll need it later. If it's not there, hop worlds or wait for it to spawn again.
Return the repaired axe to Acatzin in the Tel Teklan pub.
Pick the damiana bush at the east entrance of Tal Teklan for some damiana leaves, we'll need these later.
Go south-west of Kauayotl and pick up two planks from besides the lake. If it's not there, hop worlds or wait for it to spawn again.
Talk to Kauayotl at the east entrance of Tal Teklan.
Repair Kauayotl's cart.
Talk to Kauayotl again after repairing his cart.
Talk to Nezketi in the Tal Teklan temple.
Fill your empty bowl with water at the water pump near the eastern entrance of Tal Teklan.
Mix damiana leaves with your bowl of water.
Use your bowl of damiana water on the stove in the east part of Tal Teklan to boil it.
Pour the damiana tea from your bowl into the empty cup
Return to Nezketi in the Tal Teklan temple and give him the cup of damiana tea.
Return to the temple north of Tal Teklan and speak with one of King's men.

steps.panelName: Couldn't put Bumpty Numpty back together again...

steps.stepDescription: Fetch the Large egg from the chicken coop south of the large temple. Be ready to fight a level 17 chicken.
Fetch the Dragon egg from the dragon cave south-east of the large temple, across the river. Be ready to fight a Red dragon.
Fetch the Jaguar egg from the tent, east of the dragon cave. Be ready to fight a level 88 jaguar.
Give the eggs to King's men at the Tal Teok Temple, north of Tal Teklan.
Return to the large temple north of Tal Teklan and talk with one of King's men to evaluate the Humphrey Dumphrey alternatives.
Talk to one of King's men to figure out how to solve the broken-egg conundrum.
Put Lumpty Mumpty back together again.
Talk to one of King's men to finish the quest.
